notes: Candidate headshot URLs for the 20 reviewers of the Mirror Bacteria Technical Report. Sources prioritized: Wikimedia Commons (CC), then university faculty/lab pages, institutional press, and personal websites. Direct image URLs were extracted from each source's HTML where possible; for some pages the CMS protected the asset (403/SSL) and only the source page URL is provided so a user can grab the image manually. URLs are best-effort and some institutional CDNs append cache tokens that may expire.
